payload.name: Rohan Dubey
work_experience: cost-efficient data platforms on AWS. 7+ years building production pipelines with Flink, Kafka/MSK, Kinesis Data Analytics,
Spark, and DynamoDB/S3. Proven impact on cost savings, performance tuning, and reliability for business-critical pipelines.
CORE STRENGTHS
- Streaming & Batch: Apache Flink, Apache Kafka (MSK), Spark, Kinesis Data Analytics (KDA), Airflow
- Storage & Databases: AWS DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Delta/Parquet/ORC, S3
- Infra & Cloud: AWS (S3, Glue, EMR, KDA, MSK, Redshift, Athena), Kubernetes, Docker
- Data Platforms & Tools: Dremio, Snowflake, NiFi/Registry, GitHub/GitLab, CI/CD
- Specialties: Streaming design, backpressure and checkpointing, schema evolution, serialization (Kryo/Avro/Protobuf),
payload.summary: Rohan Dubey Hyderabad, India | +91-7093123447 | rohankumardubey497@gmail.com | github.com/rohankumardubey | rohankumardubey.github.io SUMMARY
